message:
fix: parallel call groups now track correct per-group turn numbers

Previously all parallel groups used maxTurn (the highest turn seen across
the entire session). Now each group tracks the turn from the most recent
plan_end event at the time of its primitive_start events.

Changes:
- Add currentTurn variable updated on each plan_end event
- Add turn field to toolCalls entries, set from currentTurn on primitive_start
- Use first entry's turn for each parallel group instead of maxTurn
- Add tests for multi-group turn tracking and no-plan_end default
